sessionSummary: Investigated sibling-memory trigger duplication while keeping the claude optimization settings continuation discoverable for Phase 6.

keyDecisions.decision: Preserve only one informative cluster anchor when it adds new context
keyDecisions.rationale: Sibling memories should keep one leaf-level continuation anchor instead of inheriting the whole parent packet scaffold.

filesModified.description: Guarded the fallback cluster anchor append for trigger phrase generation.
